description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a rectangular lot with a driveway leading to a carport or garage at the front. The house features a flat roof and a minimalist design, with clean lines and large windows that allow for ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a manicured lawn, trees, and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. The front entryway is defined by a simple path and is flanked by low hedges and a small gate. The rear and sides of the house are bordered by additional landscaping, including a row of trees and a privacy wall. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping, set on a rectangular lot with a driveway and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entryway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, carport, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, privacy wall, and dense tree line for seclusion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, window arrangement, and additional greenery along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, short path, low hedges, and no porch or overhang
